display.name: Wayhouse Ember Offer
display.short_description: A collapsed wayhouse still shelters one emberstone in its cracked brazier. It can warm flesh or be broken for the lesson inside.

choices.label: Warm yourself by the ember
choices.summary: Hold still long enough for the stone's last heat to soak through your ribs.

choices.label: Salvage the quartermaster strap
choices.summary: Dig a soot-dark belt rig out from under the fallen bench and keep it for the long march ahead.
